title: Chested Companions
description: Equip chests on your fluffy friends!
body:
#

 

![About](https://i.imgur.com/g8x3Mf2.png)

 

**Chested Companions** allows you to put a chest on tamed cats and dogs.
That chest has 9 slots (configurable!), and can only be accessed by the pet's owner (also configurable).

The chest can be removed by clicking the pet with **Shears**.

 
![Cat Standing with Chest](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/821/500/cat_standing.png)
![Dog Standing with Chest](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/821/498/dog_standing.png)
 
 

This mod is required both on the **client side** and the **server side**.
#

 

![Support me or the mod](https://i.imgur.com/iSODrYN.png)

*Thanks a lot!*

# More Chest Variants!

![Chested Companions + More Chest Variants](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/843/829/more_chest_variants.png "Showcase of the More Chest Variants mod with Chested Companions")

I highly recommend installing the [More Chest Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-chest-variants-lieonlion "More Chest Variants") mod by **LieOnLion**, which adds many more chest variants which can be used on your pets! 

# Honorable mention

![Chested Companions + Cat Loaf](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/822/326/image.png "Cat loafing with chest")

If you'd like to improve your cats further, I recommend installing the [Cat Loaf](https://modrinth.com/mod/cat-loaf "Cat Loaf") mod, which is compatible with Chested Companions!
